required_command.command: cd desktop; bun run test src/components/workflow/WorkflowComponents.test.tsx src/api/skills.test.ts src/__tests__/skillsSettings.test.tsx
required_command.summary: 3 test files passed; 62 tests passed. Existing WorkflowTemplateEditor React act warnings were emitted but did not fail the run.

ui_state_summary.workflow_status_panel: Recommended skill status now shows visible name, status, source, pluginName, namespace, referenceId, contentHash, and relevant evidence for used, relevant-skipped, and relevant-unavailable outcomes, including rationale, toolUseId, and artifactRef where present.
ui_state_summary.settings_skill_catalog: Skill settings catalog metadata is preserved in store state and made searchable/visible through existing skill card text without adding run, execute, install, enable, or auto-run controls.
ui_state_summary.filtering: Unused available bundled recommendations remain hidden from concise workflow status while degraded, unavailable, missing, plugin-disabled, unsupported-source, and evidence-backed items remain visible.

api_shape_summary.skillsApi.catalog: Accepts optional options as { workflowOnly?: boolean } and emits catalogOnly=true plus workflowOnly=true when requested, preserving cwd query encoding and long timeout.
api_shape_summary.skillStore.fetchCatalog: Accepts the same workflowOnly option and stores metadata-only catalog entries without fetching skill detail bodies.
api_shape_summary.types: SkillCatalogStatus now preserves the full WorkflowPhaseSkillResolutionStatus union; workflow recommended skill summary items include namespace, referenceId, and contentHash.

tests_run.command: cd desktop; bun run test src/components/workflow/WorkflowComponents.test.tsx src/api/skills.test.ts src/__tests__/skillsSettings.test.tsx

must_preserve_evidence.MP-005: No execution, install, enable, run, or auto-run affordances were added; passing tests assert these controls are absent in WorkflowStatusPanel and Skills settings.
must_preserve_evidence.MP-006: Same-name/provenance-sensitive catalog data is preserved through source, pluginName, namespace, referenceId, contentHash, and provenance metadata without collapsing identities.
must_preserve_evidence.MP-010: Recommended-skill visibility stays read-only and does not alter pending-confirmation priority or workflow transition authority.
must_preserve_evidence.CA-008: Desktop now exposes explicit workflow-safe catalog filtering and visible status/provenance/evidence states instead of aggregate-only recommendation counts.

CA-006.evidence: WorkflowStatusPanel renders used, relevant-skipped, and relevant-unavailable evidence with rationale plus toolUseId/artifactRef when available, and hides unused evidence.

CA-008.evidence: skillsApi.catalog sends workflowOnly=true without detail loading, and desktop UI/state surfaces missing, plugin-disabled, unsupported-source, source, pluginName, referenceId, and contentHash metadata.

recovery_guidance: Repository has unrelated pre-existing dirty files outside T010 scope; do not revert or attribute them to this worker.
WorkflowStartDialog.tsx, WorkflowTemplatePicker.tsx, and locale files were allowed but not needed for the T009 RED-to-green behavior.
